## Change Type

- [x] Bugfix (non-breaking change).
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change).
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that compromises existing functionality).
- [ ] Code cleanup or refactoring.
- [ ] Documentation.
- [ ] Other.
